actionItems.title: Job Listing
actionItems.detail: I texted Luke at the end of last week, just letting him know we were going to launch a job listing in the next couple of weeks. Can you let me know what I need to do with the recruiter in order to launch it, or if you'd rather wait one more week?

actionItems.title: Feb Commissions
actionItems.detail: I prepped everything yesterday to send you my February permissions. Just leaving this here to remind myself to talk about some of the Anchor commissions so that way we don't have to do it completely over email

prepping.text: Five Below LOI redline to Micah
prepping.detail: Draft loaded, ready for your review/send

prepping.text: Email triage - Kate Yoon + Micah Memphis

new.name: Malone Plaza
new.status: Five Below - They just sent back their LOI this morning. Finishing my briefing document, and then I will review and we can talk about Shoe Dept - I talked to Paul at the end of last week and will fill you in. I am revising the shared access language and going to send it back to them after this meeting Ajay Secore - Golf Simulator (New Lead) - Inbound inquiry 3/1 for Unit 3. Wants to open a golf simulator business. Has existing hat/boarding business. $100K liquid cash, ~$200K total buildout budget. Call held 3/2 - Jacob sent architectural drawing, virtual tour, and lockbox code. Prospect is engaged and following up.

new.name: Gastonia
new.status: I responded to the LOI. They are requesting an extra $30,000(from 50-80) in TI to fix the front doors and some of the side windows that have been busted. We will also need to fix this roof and most likely replace it- it is already on the asset management dashboard for this year. We are currently at 12.50 for rent. My thought is to go back to them and tell them we can give them the 30,000, and since we're going to have to replace the roof and give them HVACs. We need to bump the starting rent up $.50-1.00. I think that gets a deal done, and they seem like a good operator, and we've been sitting on this space for a while so I think we should do it.

new.name: Russellville ABC Retail
new.status: Stage: Lease Draft & Review | Lease received in the mail (email from Melissa Eddy 3/3). Requires 3 hand-signed copies - not DocuSign. Melissa asking if Micah is good to sign. Need to coordinate getting copies signed and returned.

new.name: Charles Hawkins Co.
new.status: Stephen Prather (Charles Hawkins Co.) submitted LOI for hotel space. Tenants are Lexy and Austin - "very excited about getting a deal done" and believe they'll drive traffic to the hotel. Want to be in the space ASAP but understand there are moving parts. Awaiting response.

new.name: Montgomery
new.status: QT Nails (1642 Atlanta HWY) - Full lease application received 3/5. QT Nails by Dwaine LLC, principals Nhung Pham and Dwaine High from Montgomery, AL. Pedicure/nail shop. Looking for 5-year term, projected opening May 1, 2026. They have another location at 3980 Atlanta HWY. Tax docs uploaded. We are working on all these to get to them. Hoping to move through this one quickly.

new.name: McMinnville
new.status: I've been coordinating with Jon Petty, their UPS store franchisee has interest in one of our small shops. I am going to meet them on site on the 18th. It is a good excuse to go out there in Matterport, the haunted house, and look at some other spaces as well.

dropped.name: Coaches Bargainz (Russellville) lease fully executed Feb 25
dropped.property: Coaches Bargainz (Russellville) lease fully executed Feb 25

dropped.name: Review five below LOI. (information in Slack)
dropped.property: Review five below LOI. (information in Slack)

dropped.name: Runnings
dropped.lastStatus: There was no definitive timeline in the lease around us getting the Memorandum of Exclusive signed by Runnings. Do we even want to try to get them to sign it, or just move on to the alternative? I can explain more in depth in our meeting.

updated.name: Hope Smiles
updated.to: All good here. Hoping to connect with Shelby after this

updated.name: Buena Vista
updated.to: Do you have more documents besides this folder? Asking in light of looking for a survey, etc.

items.text: Hamilton — finalize REA for Dutch Bros outparcel (with Melissa)
items.detail: Melissa using Hamilton as template. Jacob coordinating.

items.text: Lebanon — reach out to Mark (Eagle Nest) re: end of 2027 end date
items.detail: Discuss transition plans, get ahead of lease end.

items.text: Madison — re-engage Tony on Starbucks outparcel
items.detail: 2026 push. Tony = outparcel contact.

items.text: Madison — dust off sister building development plan (with Micah)
items.detail: Ask GC to reprice ~10k SF sister strip behind center. Grants still available (~$30k).

items.text: Madison — check if Muse's security deposit has burned off
items.detail: Muse's dad put up a deposit. Verify current status.

items.text: Madison — monitor Passage Kava (~3 months to default window)
items.detail: Oct 2023 start, 36-month lease = Oct 2026 end. Watch rent payments.

items.text: Malone — finalize Five Below lease (imminent)
items.detail: Also see sweep-3 for LOI sign/renderings task.

items.text: Malone — push Papaloo toward April real estate committee
items.detail: Interested but slow. If approved by committee, move to lease negotiation.

items.text: Malone — ask architect how much proactive Joanne's demo saves
items.detail: Joanne's vacating creates demo opportunity. Get GC/architect cost estimate.

items.text: Malone — confirm Marshalls September delivery window
items.detail: Verify September is achievable given current construction schedule.

items.text: Maple Row — proactively reach out to Flavors of India re: Hendersonville Nutrition space
items.detail: Space expires ~Oct 2026 (~7 months out). They tried last year, dragged feet. Offer before listing.

items.text: McMinnville — develop tenant-by-tenant rent increase/MTM plan
items.detail: Many tenants on MTM. Build a plan for each.

items.text: McMinnville — set up in-person meeting with Betty Blanks (Paddler's Mall)
items.detail: Re: suite reconfiguration for Wingstop/EPS.

items.text: Meridian — market building to Jackson-area doctors/dentists (if auction approved)
items.detail: Medical office angle. Pending auction decision.

items.text: Millington — list outparcel
items.detail: Confirm Tractor Supply no-build area doesn't restrict it first.

items.text: Millington — follow up on Hot Works inquiry
items.detail: Confirm whether Planet Fitness exclusion blocks hot yoga/infrared sauna.

items.text: New Memphis — draw out suite-split plan (3rd + 4th floor), hand to Mathison
items.detail: Low-cost demising walls, existing HVAC can flow through, existing windows. Ray (handyman) is the guy.

items.text: New Memphis — get banner/window signage on Barefoot Bride space (with Clay)
items.detail: Vacant space needs visibility.

items.text: Parma — watch Gabe's rent on 2nd of every month (with Carole)
items.detail: 3 missed rents already. One more = automatic default. Send default notice immediately on first late.

items.text: Pell City — finalize REA (4-parcel structure, new clean REA, with Melissa)
items.detail: Existing REA is a mess per Ashby. Melissa using Hamilton Dutch Bros as template.

items.text: Pell City — reach out to Fresh Value owner re: Bender suite / expansion interest
items.detail: Check if Fresh Value wants adjacent space.

items.text: Russellville — close Suite 12 pizza deal (Florence operator)
items.detail: Imminent. Florence-area pizza operator.

items.text: Sevierville — put mattress store space on market
items.detail: Cosmoprof doubtful to renew.

items.text: Sevierville — push outparcel once new leasing hire is in place
items.detail: Hold until hire is onboard.

items.text: Trousdale/Vann — approach Bo Rucker about early renewal in context of sale
items.detail: Locking in a renewal strengthens the sale story.

items.text: Trousdale/Vann — follow up with national apparel store broker (Replay replacement)
items.detail: Replay vacated. Broker has national contacts.

items.text: Wilson — follow up on FRWD renewal
